name: Michael Hashim
abstract: Michael James Hashim (April 9, 1956, Geneva, New York) is an American jazz alto and soprano saxophonist. Hashim began playing saxophone while in elementary school, playing with Phil Flanigan and Chris Flory as a high schooler.

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Flanigan
about_quotes.evidence: my contemporaries in Geneva, in years probably ‘72 to ‘74, Michael Hashim, the alto saxophonist
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Flanigan interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Diego, California, February 15, 1998
